scripts.dev: tsx watch --env-file=.env --input-type=module --eval "import { buildApp } from './src/server.ts'; import { loadConfig } from './src/config.ts'; const cfg = loadConfig(); const { app } = await buildApp(cfg); await app.listen({ port: cfg.port, host: '0.0.0.0' }); console.log('OrgOS server on :' + cfg.port);"
scripts.start: tsx --env-file=.env --input-type=module --eval "import { buildApp } from './src/server.ts'; import { loadConfig } from './src/config.ts'; const cfg = loadConfig(); const { app } = await buildApp(cfg); await app.listen({ port: cfg.port, host: '0.0.0.0' }); console.log('OrgOS server on :' + cfg.port);"
